---
pagetitle: "Blogs"
filters:
  - filters/post_visibility.lua
listing:
  - id: full-research
    contents: posts
    include:
      kind: full-research
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: true
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: mini-research
    contents: posts
    include:
      kind: mini-research
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: explanatory
    contents: posts
    include:
      kind: explanatory
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: misc
    contents: posts
    include:
      kind: misc
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
---

::: {.post-kind-section data-post-kind="full-research"}
## Full Research Project Posts

Completed research projects with their methods, experiments, and conclusions. Note: some work may be replications of existing papers.

::: {#full-research}
:::
:::

::: {.post-kind-section data-post-kind="mini-research"}
## Mini Research Posts

Intermediate investigations and milestones within a broader research project.

::: {#mini-research}
:::
:::

::: {.post-kind-section data-post-kind="explanatory"}
## Explanatory Posts

Conceptual walkthroughs, paper syntheses, and notes written to consolidate understanding.

::: {#explanatory}
:::
:::

::: {.post-kind-section data-post-kind="misc"}
## Misc Posts

Philosophy, non-technical writing, and everything else.

::: {#misc}
:::
:::
